title: Assertion error overriding top-level parameter on command line.

features.name: command_line_parameter_override_on_top_module
features.description: Code should include a top-level module with parameters that can be overridden via command line using -Pmodule.param=value syntax

features.name: sv2012_mode_with_parameter_override
features.description: Code should include a parameterized module compiled in SystemVerilog 2012 mode with -g2012 flag and command-line parameter override
